text.message: I think I took a bad choice, but didnt want anyone else to get double ore
yeah, but you and blue gave me no other option
feel like you shouldve gone 9 10 11 and built to where you are
that would leave green the 8-4-3 anyway
oh yeah i dont care about that
gotta do whats best for you
That's what i was offering on my turn
you didn't gave me time to answer the last trade
black and blue not targeting each other is wild
you are competing against each other
blue is 6 pts with 3 down devs lol
thought you might have a card I need
would have solod his sheep if I wanted to solo
that doesnt really h urt blue
yeah, as people buy devs, that happens
dude's 4 down devs and didn't play one now
yes you are right blue has bought one every turn
red hasnt played one in eons
trying to explain the game to someone who has 21% WR for the last 4 seasons
at least the username is true
you clearly have all the vps red
so you know its not me
black is going to take road from green long term because green is capped
and now he has a city
you now roads have limits right?
you have the 3 roads you need
if black didnt have that rb like 5 rounds ago i wouldve double played
blue might still have double play
you and green are at 9 though
insane to rob me there lol
gg black hope you have a good day
